meaning: n.斜纹织物vt.把...织成斜纹adj.斜纹织物的
examples: Twill wake him to take him up and put him within the bed, and he sorely needeth sleep.
Twill also supports the ability to run these actions as a script.
You can name the file anything you want and pass it to twill-sh.
There was much of both to enjoy: shawl collars, suits and cable-knit sweaters in wool, twill, suede, and corduroy.
Outlier recently updated the OGs with some subtle improvements but, just like the old ones, they are an entirely synthetic superversion of office-ready wool or cotton twill trousers.
